Neal Chandra
About

About

Hi, I’m Neal Chandra, welcome to my blog. I’m currently a software engineer at Discord.

I intend to use this as an unstructured repository of my thoughts regarding topics of interest to me. I’m initially creating the blog to share learnings from my exploration with AI, with a focus on open source efforts such as around Meta’s Llama family of models, and to document some investigations I’m doing in the space.

I plan to share my thoughts on other topics in tech, but also hopefully some other areas of interest, such as sports, travel, and finance.

You can find me online on twitter, github, and huggingface.

Neal Chandra
